title: Rendered Horizons (A Distant Horizons Modpack)
description: [1.21.5 UPDATED] Distant Horizons, with shaders and peak performance that will truly beautify Minecraft.
body:
##
Description
**Rendered Horizons** is a _lightweight_ modpack featuring Distant Horizons and Iris Shaders, allowing you to see _extremely f***ing far_. 👀 It includes compatible shaderpacks & eye-catching vanilla-like world generation by Tectonic. It's designed for seamless use on any server, it just works out of the box! ##
Performance and FPS
Settings and Specs Specs

Graphics Card: RTX 3060ti
Processor: Ryzen 7 5700g
OS: Windows 11
RAM: 16gigs DDR4
RAM allocated: 10000MB

Distant Horizons Settings

Quality: Medium
CPU Load: Low Impact
LOD Render Distance: 128

Minecraft Settings

Resolution: 1440 x 1080
Shadow Distance: 12
Render Distance: 12
Simulation Distance: 5
Shader: Complementary Re-imagined
FPS: Average - 142
##
Comparison
Features Rendered Horizons Distantly Optimized New Horizons
Utility Yes Yes No
Optimization Yes, with custom settings and better performance Yes No
Shaders Yes, with custom settings for max performance and appearance Yes Yes
Terrain / WorldGen Yes, with Tectonic and several terrain improvement mods Yes, but only with tectonic Yes, doesn't feel vanilla
Updates Yes, frequent updates including shaders and utilities Yes Yes

### Download the modpack and experience it for your own! You don't need a powerful PC!
